title: SASC Advances Nomination of Gen. Eric Sm...
description: On Wednesday, June 21, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted to report out favorably the nomination of General Eric Smith, USMC, to be Commandant...
text:
On Wednesday, June 21, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted to report out favorably the nomination of General Eric Smith, USMC, to be Commandant of the Marine Corps.
The committee also voted to report out favorably the nomination of Major General Leonard Anderson, USMC, to be Commander of Marine Forces Reserve and Marine Forces South.
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
